approvals.heading: Approval chains
approvals.description: Configure approval chains for invoices. Chains are matched based on conditions like amount thresholds.

empty.heading: No approval chains configured
empty.body: Create an approval chain to route invoices through multi-level approvals before payment.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this approval chain?
deleteConfirm.body: This chain will be permanently deleted. In-flight approvals using this chain will not be affected.

editor.createDescription: Set up a new approval chain with levels and routing conditions.
editor.editDescription: Update chain settings, approval levels, and routing conditions.
editor.defaultHelp: The default chain is used when no conditions match.
editor.conditionsHelp: When an invoice matches these conditions, this chain is used. Leave empty for the default chain.

Errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.

Errors.ESIGN_DOWNLOAD_FAILED: Failed to download document from storage.

login.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a sign-in link
login.linkSentTo: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click the link to access the portal.
login.didntReceive: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or try another email.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.noToken: No verification token found. Please request a new sign-in link.
errors.sessionFailed: Failed to create session. Please try again.
errors.unexpectedResponse: Unexpected response. Please request a new sign-in link.
errors.linkExpired: This link has expired. Request a new sign-in link.
errors.orgSelectFailed: Failed to select organization. Please try again.

orgPicker.title: Select Organization
orgPicker.description: You work with multiple organizations. Choose one to continue.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and preferences

fields.emailReadOnly: Contact your organization to change your email

settings.financialApprovalNote: Changes to financial details require organization approval before taking effect.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.

categories.invoiceUpdatesDesc: Get notified when your invoice status changes
categories.paymentConfirmationsDesc: Get notified when a payment is processed
categories.contractChangesDesc: Get notified about contract renewals or amendments
categories.documentUploadsDesc: Get notified when new documents are shared

errors.updateFailed: Failed to update preference. Please try again.

ksef.descriptionDisconnected: Auto-fetch invoices from Poland's national e-invoicing system
ksef.connectDescription: Configure your KSeF credentials to auto-fetch invoices issued to your organization.
ksef.orgNipMissing: NIP must be set in Organization Settings first
ksef.tokenPlaceholder: Paste your KSeF API token here
ksef.tokenHelper: Generate this token in the KSeF portal at ksef.mf.gov.pl
ksef.certificateDropZone: Drop certificate file here or click to browse
ksef.connectionFailedToast: Failed to connect to KSeF. Please check your credentials.
ksef.syncNoNewToast: No new invoices found in KSeF
ksef.syncFailedToast: KSeF sync failed. Check connection status in Settings.
ksef.disconnectBody: This will stop auto-fetching invoices from KSeF. Existing KSeF invoices will not be affected.
ksef.syncHistoryEmpty: No sync history yet. Click Sync Now to fetch invoices from KSeF.
ksef.duplicateBody: A matching invoice was found in KSeF (invoice number {invoiceNumber}, seller NIP {sellerNip}). The KSeF version is government-validated.
ksef.voidConfirmBody: This invoice will be marked as void. The KSeF version will remain as the authoritative record.

CalendarSettings.pageDescription: Connect your personal calendar to sync deadlines and events from Contractor Ops.
CalendarSettings.connectDescription: Connect your calendar to receive deadline reminders and meeting invites.
CalendarSettings.disconnectBody: Upcoming events will no longer be synced. Existing events on your calendar will not be removed.
CalendarSettings.disconnectFailedToast: Could not disconnect calendar. Try again.
CalendarSettings.syncedEventsHelper: Events are automatically created for contract expiry, approval SLA deadlines, and payment due dates.
CalendarSettings.calendarEventDescription: Configure the event created when this task activates.
CalendarSettings.attendeesHint: Comma-separated email addresses. The contractor and task assignee are included automatically.
CalendarSettings.createCalendarEvent: Create calendar event when task activates
CalendarSettings.orgCalendarDescription: Events will be pushed to this shared calendar for the entire organization.
